prompt: Write a paragraph about your favorite season. Do not use any punctuation whatsoever. No periods, commas, apostrophes, question marks, exclamation points, or any other punctuation marks.
response: My favorite season is autumn because the air feels crisp and fresh and the trees turn brilliant shades of red orange and gold I love walking outside and hearing the leaves crunch under my feet while a cool breeze moves through the branches Autumn also brings cozy sweaters warm drinks and a calm peaceful feeling that makes everything seem more comfortable and beautiful
